gazette: Official Gazette dated March 01, 2024, and numbered 32476
title: Removal of Some Tool Steel Types from the TSE List
bodyHtml:
As of March 1, 2023, certain types of tool steels that were subject to TSE inspection have been removed from the annexed list of the TSE-TAREKS Regulation numbered 2024/1.

Removed GTIPs from the List:

  • 7228.10.20.00.00: Only hot-rolled and drawn; Hot-rolled and drawn 
  • 7228.10.50.00.00: Forged
  • 7228.10.90.00.00: Others
  • 7228.30.20.00.00: Those made of tool steel
  • 7228.30.69.00.00: Those with a diameter of less than 80 mm
  • 7228.40.10.00.00: Those made of tool steel
  • 7228.50.20.00.00: Those made of tool steel

For the Amendment to the Regulation on Conformity Assessment to Standards in Import (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/1), click here.
